name: Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler over simmering water, combine butter, sugar, lemon juice, and egg yolks.
2. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens enough to heavily coat the back of a spoon (do not let the mixture come to a boil or the egg yolks will curdle).
3. Remove from heat and stir in lemon zest.
4. Pour into a sterilized dry container and keep refrigerated.
Enjoy your homemade Lemon Curd!
